content: I was really disappointed to get a character (Mouchette) from a Sepirot Capture that I already had at E12. I think it's a bit unfair that I buy a pack, drop a character, and then get essentially nothing in the Sepirot Capture. Maybe there's a way to prevent characters who are already at E12 from dropping from Sepirot Captures? I'll have two more Sepirot Captures like this, but I don't want to donate for them now because I might get Mouchette
those are the random awakeners bottles?
